assumptions: The concept targets businesses in Suriname unless a narrower audience is supplied.
Placement dimensions, safe areas, eligibility, and overlays require current platform preview before publication.
Exact copy and the official Zenta logo will be added during final design production, not image prompting.

campaign.audience: local business owners in Suriname whose essential discovery information is missing or unclear

creative_strategy.audience_insight: The business does not control when a local customer begins searching, but it can control whether essential information is clear.
creative_strategy.message_angle: Google visibility is framed as a well-prepared discovery window rather than a ranking promise.
creative_strategy.hook: Be clear when customers are looking.
creative_strategy.hypothesis: A prepared display-window metaphor will connect profile completeness with customer readiness without using platform trade dress.

format.crop_guidance: Keep the focal subject and reserved copy area inside the central composition with generous edge clearance.

visual_direction.subject: a beautifully organized local business display window containing abstract cues for place, hours, service, and contact
visual_direction.action: a passerby pauses because the essential information is visually coherent and easy to scan
visual_direction.environment: a contemporary Paramaribo street in soft early-evening light
visual_direction.composition: display window fills right two-thirds, passerby silhouette lower-left, clean upper-left copy field
visual_direction.lighting: warm storefront light balanced by cool dusk and one precise lime accent
visual_direction.style: cinematic retail editorial photography with elegant conceptual merchandising

copy.overlay_headline: Be clear when customers are looking.
copy.caption: When customers look for a local business, essential information should be easy to understand. Zenta helps organize your Google Business Profile and Maps presence.

image_prompt: Create a polished 4:5 base image concept for a Zenta Creative paid ad image. The central subject is a beautifully organized local business display window containing abstract cues for place, hours, service, and contact. Show a passerby pauses because the essential information is visually coherent and easy to scan. Set the scene in a contemporary Paramaribo street in soft early-evening light. Composition: display window fills right two-thirds, passerby silhouette lower-left, clean upper-left copy field. Lighting: warm storefront light balanced by cool dusk and one precise lime accent. Visual style: cinematic retail editorial photography with elegant conceptual merchandising. Use Zenta's near-black foundation with the controlled palette #030507, #F4F7FB, #B9FF66, #5EE7FF, #9B7CFF; keep lime as the decisive action accent rather than flooding the image with one hue. The image must communicate the strategic angle 'Google visibility is framed as a well-prepared discovery window rather than a ranking promise.' without claiming a result. Reserve clean, high-contrast negative space for the headline 'Be clear when customers are looking.', support line 'Google Business Profile + Maps', and CTA 'Set up your Google profile' to be typeset later by a designer. Do not render any words, letters, prices, logo, wordmark, platform mark, interface copy, or functional QR code inside the base image. Keep the focal subject and copy-safe space comfortably away from edges for placement preview. Avoid search-result screenshots, rankings, crowd scenes, sale signage or fake business names, fake evidence, visual clutter, and distorted objects or anatomy.
negative_constraints: no generated logo, wordmark, trademark, or third-party platform branding
no fabricated metrics, rankings, leads, revenue, testimonials, or guarantees
no copied Google, Meta, Facebook, Instagram, or WhatsApp interface
no tiny unreadable text, random letters, watermark, or signature
no stereotypes, unapproved likenesses, or identifiable private customer data
search-result screenshots, rankings, crowd scenes, sale signage or fake business names

accessibility.alt_text: A passerby views an organized storefront window with cues for location, hours, services, and contact.
accessibility.contrast_note: Typeset final copy in white or near-black on a solid high-contrast area and verify readability at mobile size.

required_review: Do not imply guaranteed ranking, traffic, calls, visits, or Google affiliation.
Confirm the base image contains no generated branding, fake proof, copied platform trade dress, or private data.
Preview final typography, logo placement, crop, and overlays in every intended placement.

production.typography_instruction: Add the exact overlay copy later using Zenta's bold modern geometric sans-serif system; do not ask an image model to typeset it.
production.logo_instruction: Reserve space for the approved Zenta logo and place the original brand asset only during final design production.
